D4 Colorimetry L4 Analyze Reference

BT.2020 vs Rec.709

overlay the UHD gamut on the HD one and shade the wide-gamut bonus — the colours HDR can show that SDR never could

Rec.709 defines HD/SDR colour; BT.2020 defines UHD/HDR. BT.2020's primaries sit far closer to the spectral locus, so it reaches deep greens and reds that Rec.709 simply cannot encode.

Switch what the diagram shades: the Rec.709 region, the full BT.2020 region, or just the gap between them — the wide-gamut colours BT.2020 adds. The readout reports each gamut's chromaticity area and Rec.709's coverage of BT.2020.
